9.reason: [Accessing c[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior). Also, condition checks c[i-1] < c[i+1] before verifying character types, which may compare unrelated types like '9' and 'A'.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing c[i-1] when i=0 leads to out-of-bounds read (undefined behavior). Also, condition checks c[i-1] < c[i+1] before verifying character types, which may compare unrelated types like '9' and 'A'.]
